splash.body:
Let’s practice building some Performance orders!

Your account executive, Ryan Giordano, forwarded you an email from his media buyer. They want you to build a CPC order for their Home Depot campaign.

conclusion.body: Nice job! You'll get another shot building a media plan in just a little bit! Make sure you review this lab with your TA.

The Elephants Gerald

Elephants Gerald was a Pachyderm jazz singer often referred to as the pink lady elephant of song and Lady Ella. She was noted for her baritone to soprano range, nasal intonation and a “trunk-like” improvisational ability, particularly in her scat singing. Also, for being an elephant.

lab.body:
You have one goal in this lab:

  1. Build a Slingshot order that matches the client's order request.
Great question. We've created some specific resources to help you with this lab. Let's organize these resources as systems and documents.

Salesforce TOPS Classroom. A sandbox version of Salesforce. You're free to explore, mess things up and get a good feel of Salesforce without screwing up any live orders. You should have a Home Depot and an Aruba Tourism opportunity assigned to you in the sandbox. We’ll be using both for this lab.

Slingshot TOPS Classroom. A sandbox version of Slingshot. We use this for media planning, pulling avails and trafficking orders. Show your Slingshot order to your TA during your check-in for feedback.

Client Email.. Your account executive forwarded an email from the Home Depot media buyer. Lucky for you, these emails include the rates the account executive proposed.

  • Any negotiated rates
  • Total budget
  • Budget allocation
  • Demo + Geo Information

Click the button below to get your lab resources.

Once you've completed your lab assignment, click the NEXT button.

Download Lab Assets
